name: 한국어
features_list: 🏰 동맹 관리 • 동맹 생성 및 그룹 연동 • 다중 동맹 지원 👥 멤버 관리 • 자동 멤버 추적 (용광로, 이름, 서버) • 대량 멤버 추가/제거 • 변경 알림 🎁 기프트 코드 시스템 • 자동 코드 사용 • 새 코드 확인 (5분 간격) • 상세한 오류 보고 📅 출석 시스템 • 이벤트 참여 추적 • 출석 보고서 🔔 이벤트 알림 • 자동 이벤트 알림 • 맞춤 시간 설정
add_bot_button: 아래 버튼을 클릭하거나 봇을 그룹에 수동으로 추가하세요.
admin_notice: ⚠️ 참고: 봇 명령어는 관리자만 사용할 수 있습니다.
help_text: 📚 WhiteBot 명령어 가이드 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🚀 일반 /start - 봇 시작 /help - 이 도움말 표시 /setup - 설정 마법사 /panel - 관리자 제어판 /language - 개인 언어 변경 /setgrouplang - 그룹 언어 변경 /premium - 구독 및 제한 /support - 지원 문의 👤 계정 관리 /register - 게임 계정 등록 /delete - 등록된 계정 삭제 /profile - 프로필 보기 /history - 플레이어 변경 이력 /checkuser [FID] - FID로 유저 확인 🏰 동맹 관리 /alliance - 동맹 정보 /setupalliance - 그룹에서 동맹 생성 /alliancetag - 동맹 태그 변경 /alliancename - 동맹 이름 변경 /setgroup - 그룹을 동맹에 연결 /getlinkcode - Discord 연결 코드 /unlinkdiscord - Discord 연결 해제 /admins - 관리자 관리 👥 멤버 관리 /addmember [FID] - 멤버 추가 /removemember [FID] - 멤버 제거 /members - 멤버 보기 /bulkremove - 대량 멤버 제거 🎁 기프트 코드 /codes - 기프트 코드 목록 /usecode [CODE] - 전체 멤버에 코드 사용 /addcode [CODE] - 기프트 코드 수동 추가 🔄 이전 및 게임 정보 /transfer [서버] - 왕국 이전 정보 /state - 서버 타임라인 및 이벤트 /calc - 게임 계산기 📅 이벤트 및 출석 /events - 이벤트 보기 /addevent - 이벤트 추가 /attendance - 출석 추적 /changes - 최근 변경사항 ⚙️ 제어 및 추적 /startcontrol - 자동 추적 시작 /stopcontrol - 자동 추적 중지 /setinterval - 확인 간격 설정 /settings - 설정 📋 구글 폼 /addform - 자동 입력 폼 추가 /forms - 저장된 폼 목록 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡 소유자 명령어: /help owner
user_not_found: ❌ 잘못된 FID이거나 사용자를 찾을 수 없습니다.
api_error: ❌ 사용자 데이터를 가져올 수 없습니다. API 오류.
api_timeout_failed: 게임 서버에 연결할 수 없습니다. 몇 분 후 다시 시도해주세요.
api_timeout_desc:
게임 서버에 연결할 수 없습니다. 일시적인 문제일 수 있습니다.

💡 몇 분 후 다시 시도해주세요.
group_only_command: 이 명령어는 그룹에서만 사용할 수 있습니다.
group_bound_info: 이 그룹의 작업은 이제 이 동맹과 연동됩니다.
only_groups: ❌ 이 명령어는 그룹에서만 사용할 수 있습니다.
no_alliance_added:
📭 아직 동맹이 추가되지 않았습니다.

먼저 /addalliance [태그] [이름]으로 동맹을 추가하세요
send_file: 📤 멤버 FID가 포함된 파일(CSV 또는 TXT)을 보내주세요.
file_format: 파일 형식: 한 줄에 FID 하나
bot_closed:
❌ 봇이 현재 새 등록을 받지 않습니다.
나중에 다시 시도해주세요.
only_group_admins: ❌ 그룹 관리자만 이 명령어를 사용할 수 있습니다.
auto_giftcode_used: 🎁 자동 기프트 코드 사용 ✅ {count}개 코드가 성공적으로 사용되었습니다!
no_giftcode_logs: 📭 이 FID에 대한 기프트 코드 기록이 없습니다.
giftcheck_started: ✅ 기프트 코드 확인 시작! 🌐 소스: wosrewards.com ⏱️ 간격: {minutes}분 새 코드가 자동으로 추가되고 알림을 받습니다.
giftcheck_already_running: 🔄 기프트 코드 확인이 이미 실행 중입니다.
giftcheck_not_running: ❌ 기프트 코드 확인이 실행 중이 아닙니다.
member_menu_desc: 동맹 멤버를 추가, 제거 및 관리합니다.
giftcode_menu_desc: 기프트 코드 및 자동 사용을 관리합니다.
add_alliance_help: 새 동맹 추가: /addalliance [태그] [이름] 예시: /addalliance ABC 나의 동맹
view_members_help: 멤버 보기: /members 또는 /members [태그] 💡 연동된 그룹에서는 태그 불필요
view_codes_help: 모든 코드 보기: /codes 코드 상태 확인: /giftcodestatus
start_control_help: 자동 추적 시작: /startcontrol 중지: /stopcontrol 간격 설정: /setinterval [분]
view_settings_help: 현재 설정 보기: /settings 로그 채널 설정: /setlogchannel
giftcode_reactivated_note: 📌 이 코드는 이전에 사용되었지만 다시 활성화되었습니다!
giftcode_already_used_test: 이 코드는 테스트 사용자가 이미 사용했습니다. 오래된 코드일 수 있습니다.
no_members_to_test: 기프트 코드를 테스트할 멤버를 찾을 수 없습니다.
username_not_resolved: 사용자명을 확인할 수 없습니다. 사용자가 먼저 봇에 메시지를 보내야 합니다.
addadmin_tip: 사용자의 메시지에 답장하거나 숫자 ID를 사용하세요.

player_not_found: 잘못된 FID이거나 플레이어를 찾을 수 없습니다.

invalid_time_format: 잘못된 시간 형식. HH:MM 형식을 사용하세요 (예: 12:00)
click_to_toggle: Click member name to toggle attendance:
date_optional: Date is optional, defaults to today
no_history_for_player: No change history found for this player.
bear_trap_desc: Set up automatic notifications for game events
select_event_desc: Choose an event to create a notification for:
select_time: Enter the event time in HH:MM format (24-hour, UTC)
minister_desc: Manage minister appointments for alliance activities
clear_warning: This will remove all appointments. This action cannot be undone!
registration_desc: Allow users to self-register using their game FID
registration_not_enabled: Registration is not enabled in this group
register_ask_fid: 📝 Registration Please send your FID (Player ID) number. 💡 You can find your FID in the game: 1️⃣ Tap your Avatar 2️⃣ Press Settings (⚙️) 3️⃣ Copy your FID

register_invalid_fid_retry: ❌ Invalid FID. Please enter a valid number (digits only):
no_telegram_id_warning: User hasn't registered via /register yet. Telegram mention not available.
auto_retry_success_msg: Your account restrictions have been lifted! All pending gift codes have been applied.
auto_retry_vip_resolved: Your VIP level increased and codes are now available!
auto_retry_furnace_resolved: Your furnace level increased and codes are now available!
bot_not_admin:
❌ Bot doesn't have admin privileges!

Please make the bot an admin and grant the following permissions:
• Manage chat
• Invite users (create invite links)
• Restrict/ban members
bot_no_invite_permission:
❌ Bot doesn't have permission to create invite links!

Please enable 'Invite users' permission in bot admin settings.
bot_no_restrict_permission:
❌ Bot cannot manage members!

Please enable 'Restrict members' permission in bot admin settings.
bot_permission_check_failed: ❌ Couldn't check bot permissions. Is the bot an admin?
bot_permissions_insufficient:
⚠️ Bot has insufficient permissions in this group!

Required permissions:
{permissions}

Please update bot admin settings.
setchannel_topic_detected: Forum topic detected! Notifications will be sent to this topic.
setchannel_select_type: Select notification type for this channel/topic
channel_type_default_desc: All notifications (unless overridden by specific channels)
channel_type_notification_desc: Furnace level, nickname changes, state changes
channels_tip: Use /setchannel in a topic/chat to configure
no_alliance_set: No alliance is set for this group
welcome_desc: Send automatic welcome messages to new members
send_welcome_message: Send the welcome message you want to use:
welcome_register_desc:
Register to receive automatic gift codes:

**1️⃣** In game, tap your Avatar
**2️⃣** Press Settings (⚙️) button
**3️⃣** Copy your FID number
**4️⃣** Type here: `/register FID`
welcome_footer: ✨ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied!
welcome_tg_greeting:
👋 Welcome {user}!

🏰 You joined **[{tag}] {name}**.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📝 **Register & Get Gift Codes!**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

To receive automatic gift codes, you need to register:

**How to register?**
1️⃣ In game, tap your **Avatar**
2️⃣ Press **Settings** (⚙️) button
3️⃣ Copy your **FID** number
4️⃣ Type here: `/register YOUR_FID`

**Example:** `/register 123456789`

✨ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied to your account!
invite_discord_desc: Click the button below to add the bot to your Discord server.
discord_tip: Use /setgroup [TAG] in Discord to link the channel to alliance.
register_info_desc: To receive gift codes and be tracked, register with your game ID:
register_find_fid: 💡 Find your FID: Game → Settings → Account → Player ID
new_member_register_prompt: 👋 Welcome! To receive automatic gift codes, please register:
why_register_list:
• 🎁 Automatic gift code redemption
• 📊 Track your progress
• 🔔 Get level-up notifications
delete_warning: This will remove the member from tracking.
profile_no_fid: No FID linked to your account

setup_continue_log_channel: Now let's set up the log channel.
no_alliance_linked_hint: No alliance is linked to this group.

tag_too_long: Tag is too long. Maximum 10 characters.
setup_tag_exists: This tag already exists. Please choose another.
log_channel_desc: The log channel receives notifications about member changes, gift codes, and events.
select_interval: How often does this event occur?
setup_hint: 💡 Use /setup to configure the bot for your group.
member_left_notice: Alliance registration cleared, account data preserved.
lang_group_desc:
This changes the GROUP/ALLIANCE language.
Notifications and announcements will use this language.
events_tip: Use /events to view all events or /addevent to create a new one.
premium_upgrade_desc: Choose a plan to unlock more features and higher limits.
premium_no_upgrades: No upgrade plans available at the moment.
premium_contact_owner: Contact bot owner to upgrade your plan.
premium_stripe_coming: Stripe payment integration coming soon. Contact owner to upgrade.
fid_ownership_question: This user wants to register using your FID. Do you approve?

fid_ownership_rejected: FID ownership rejected. This account does not belong to you.

premium_limit_upgrade_hint: 📸 To increase your limits, please send your alliance photo to the system creator. Your limits will be upgraded.
premium_already_free: ℹ️ [{tag}] {name} is already on the Free plan.

premium_click_to_pay: Click the button below to proceed to payment.
sa_select_game: Select a game for this alliance:
sa_tag_invalid_chars: Tag must contain only letters and numbers.
sa_error: Something went wrong. Please try again with /setupalliance.
alliance_only_owner: Only the alliance owner can do this.
discord_not_linked: This alliance has no Discord server linked.
discord_relink_hint: Use /getlinkcode to generate a new link code for Discord.

premium_alliance_downgraded_notify: ℹ️ [{tag}] has been downgraded to the Free plan. 📸 To upgrade again, send your alliance photo to the system creator.
gform_no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command.
gform_invalid_url: ❌ Invalid Google Form URL. Expected format: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/.../viewform
gform_requires_login: 🔒 Form Requires Google Login! This form requires users to sign in with a Google account. Auto-submission is not possible. ℹ️ This feature may be supported in a future update.
gform_already_added: ℹ️ This form is already added (ID: {id}). Use /forms to see details.
gform_no_userid_field:
❌ Could not identify User ID field.

AI Note: {notes}
gform_saved: ✅ Form saved! Starting submission for all users...
gform_pending_approval:
⏳ Your form has been submitted for review.

Once approved by the owner, it will be automatically applied to all members.
gform_approved: ✅ Form #{id} approved. Starting submission for all {game} users...
gform_no_users: ❌ No registered users found for this game type ({game}).
gform_all_submitted: ℹ️ All users have already submitted for this form.
gform_list_empty: 📋 Google Forms No forms saved yet. Use /addform [URL] to add one.
gform_detect_hint: 💡 WOS/KS form detected! To add it: /addform {url}
premium_contact_hint: 💬 To increase your limits, please contact the bot administrator.
gform_alliance_start: {icon} [{game}] Google Form Detected! ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📋 {title} {icon} {game} | 🆔 {config_id} {stats_line} {uid_line}{expire_line}👤 Detected by: {detector} ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🏰 [{tag}] {alliance} — {count} members ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⏳ Submitting form... (0/{count})
gform_approved_steps: ✅ 1/4: {fields} fields fetched ✅ 2/4: AI analysis complete ✅ 3/4: {game} form validated ✅ 4/4: Form approved!
gform_pending_steps: ✅ 1/4: {fields} fields fetched ✅ 2/4: AI analysis complete ✅ 3/4: {game} form validated ⏳ 4/4: Form submitted for review
premium_system_off_notice: ℹ️ Premium system is disabled. No charges apply.
register_dm_pending_notice: ⚠️ 등록을 완료하려면 위 버튼을 눌러 봇에게 DM을 보내세요.
register_confirmed_dm_enabled: ✅ DM이 활성화되었습니다. 새 기프트 코드가 발견되면 자동으로 적용됩니다.
setpremium_on_desc: 🟢 ON — Users can see premium plans, prices and upgrade options.
setpremium_off_desc: 🔴 OFF — Users only see 'contact owner' message (no prices shown).
setpremium_when_on: When ON: /premium shows plans, prices, comparison table, upgrade buttons.
setpremium_when_off: When OFF: /premium shows usage limits only + 'contact owner' button. No prices or plans visible to users.
setpremium_assignplan_note: Owner can still assign plans manually with /assignplan in both modes.
setpremium_invalid_arg: ❌ Invalid argument. Use: /setpremium on or /setpremium off
setpremium_already_on: ℹ️ Premium visibility is already ON.
setpremium_already_off: ℹ️ Premium visibility is already OFF.
setpremium_turned_on: ✅ Premium visibility: ON Users will now see plan comparison, prices and upgrade options in /premium.
setpremium_turned_off: ✅ Premium visibility: OFF Users will only see their current usage limits and a 'contact owner' button. No plan names, prices or upgrade buttons will be shown. You can still assign plans manually with /assignplan.
invalid_state_id: Invalid State ID. Please enter numbers only.
note_initial_heroes: Information about Generations for each day is now available. The list of Heroes will keep growing over time. There's a lot to do and only two hands to handle it 😉
note_arena_update: Opponent pool enlarged by nearby servers.
note_sunfire_castle: Sunfire Castle becomes the battleground for state alliances. Following the election of a President, ministers can be appointed. The Sunfire Castle Battle happens on Saturday.
note_fire_crystal_1_3: Fire Crystal 1-3: Completion of the 'Road to Discovery' Monument unlocks the Fire Crystal Age, granting players at Furnace level 30 the ability to enhance their buildings further.
note_svs_koi: The events run on separate timelines. If your server is below day 80 (12 weeks) when they begin, you'll experience another HOC.
note_crystal_4_5: Fire Crystal 4-5 and Crystal laboratory unlock
note_legendary_gear: Chief Legendary Gear Unlock - try our Chief Gear Calculator.
note_war_academy: War Academy, Fire Crystal Tech and T11 Troops Unlock
note_advanced_crystal: Fire Crystal Building level 6-8 and Refined Fire Crystal Unlock
broadcast_enter_message:
Type the message you want to send.
It will be delivered to all groups and users.
broadcast_tip: The message will be automatically translated to each group's language.
broadcast_ai_note: Message will be auto-translated to each group's language via AI.
history_no_records: No change records found for this player.
delete_limit_reached: You've reached your weekly deletion limit. Try again in 7 days.
delete_enter_fid: Enter the FID of the account you want to delete:
delete_not_yours: This FID doesn't belong to you.
delete_confirm_warning: ⚠️ This action cannot be undone! The account will be removed from the system.
transfer_enter_kingdom: Enter the kingdom number you want transfer info for:
transfer_not_in_any_group: This state is not in any transfer group!
transfer_not_eligible_desc: Your state is not included in the transfer group for the following dates
state_not_in_schedule: State not found in transfer schedule!
state_too_new_or_invalid: This state is too new or invalid. It's not yet included in the transfer schedule.
transfer_schedule_info: Transfer schedule typically includes states at least 100 days old.
transfer_cost_desc: Transfer Score = Furnace + Gear + Hero + Pet + Expert power (Troop power excluded)
transfer_req_power_cap: Must not exceed the Power Cap
transfer_req_furnace: Must reach required Furnace level (varies with state age)
transfer_req_no_alliance: Must not be in any Alliance
transfer_req_no_combat: City must not be in combat
transfer_req_same_gen: Target state must have same Hero Gen and FC level
transfer_req_max_chars: Fewer than 4 characters in target state
transfer_phase1: Phase 1: Pre-Transfer (3 days) — Power caps are set
transfer_phase2: Phase 2: Invitational Transfer (2 days) — President sends invites
transfer_phase3: Phase 3: Open Transfer (2 days) — Everyone can transfer
transfer_alliance_only: Transfer command only works in alliance groups
transfer_use_in_group: Use this command in your alliance group
transfer_no_alliance: This group is not linked to an alliance
transfer_alliance_suspended_desc: This alliance has been suspended. Your bot permissions are restricted.
transfer_not_member: You are not a member of this alliance
cj_main_desc: Crazy Joe event guide — wave info, point calculator and difficulty recommendation.
cj_difficulty_desc: Higher level = more enemies but more points.
cj_warning_online: ⚠️ ALL MEMBERS must be online for this wave!
cj_warning_hq: 🏰 HQ Defense — send reinforcements! No self-def points.
cj_points_tip: Higher level = more points but stronger enemies.
cj_recommend_tip: This is an estimate. Adjust based on your alliance strength.
cj_no_members: No registered members found in this alliance.
cj_no_alliance: Alliance not found. Use this in an alliance group.
addevent_usage: 📅 Add Event Notification Usage: /addevent [type] [HH:MM] [timezone] [description] {event_types} {event_list} Example: /addevent bear_trap 12:00 UTC Bear Trap starting! Timezones: UTC, Europe/Istanbul, America/New_York, etc.
eventrepeat_usage: 📅 Set Event Repeat Schedule Usage: /eventrepeat [ID] [days] Examples: • /eventrepeat 1 daily - Every day • /eventrepeat 1 mon,wed,fri - Specific days • /eventrepeat 1 off - Disable repeat Days: mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun
eventmention_usage: 📢 Set Event Mention Usage: /eventmention [ID] [type] Types: • none - No mention • everyone - @everyone • here - @here (Discord only)
transfer_update_desc: Official transfer dates have been updated!
transfer_update_check: Use /transfer [state] to see your transfer details.
transfer_update_affected: New transfer dates have been announced that include your state!
transfer_tracker_checking: Checking for new transfer sneak peeks
transfer_tracker_no_new: No new transfer sneak peeks found.
bulkadd_disabled: 🚫 The /bulkadd command has been disabled. Please use /addmember to add members one by one.
bulkadd_hint: Paste FIDs separated by spaces or commas. No TAG needed — alliance is auto-detected from group.
bulkadd_truncated: ⚠️ Limit reached! Only first {limit} will be processed.
bear_trap_tip:
If you don't have the correct heroes, send troops with NO heroes.
It's better to send no heroes than wrong heroes.
bear_trap_recall: 🚨 Remember to RECALL your troops before Bear Trap starts!
